statusEffects.name: Poison
statusEffects.description: Deals 5% max HP per turn. Permanent until cured.

statusEffects.name: Reraise
statusEffects.description: Auto-revives once upon KO with 25% HP.

statusEffects.name: Provoked
statusEffects.description: Forces targeting of the provoker. Permanent until cured.

statusEffects.name: Zombie
statusEffects.description: Healing effects deal damage instead. Permanent until cured.

statusEffects.name: Reflect
statusEffects.description: Reflects all incoming magic spells back at the caster. Permanent until cured.
